text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2505.19094 points to a real paper titled "SATORI-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal Reasoning with Spatial Grounding and Verifiable Rewards" by Chuming Shen et al. — not "Spatially anchored training with verifiable rewards for vision-language reasoning" by the cited authors (Liangcheng Shen, Yulin Li, Haitao Mi, Wenxuan Wang, Zhaopeng Tu, Dong Yu). The cited title, author list, and arXiv ID do not match any real paper found in academic databases or on the open web.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.19094
